title: leontodon crispus
intro: Leontodon crispus, also known as crisp-leaved hawk's beard or sow thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Leontodon. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Leontodon crispus is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of wounds. Herbal preparations of Leontodon crispus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
